prompt: Execute Phase D for: fix typo in README (Level 1 skip). No spec was created, so D.2 archival should be skipped. Only D.1 minimal progress note needed.

assertions.name: detects_no_spec_to_archive
assertions.description: Should detect that no OpenSpec exists and skip D.2
assertions.check: output.includes('no spec') || output.includes('skip D.2') || output.includes('D.2: skip') || output.includes('not applicable')

assertions.name: skips_d2_archival
assertions.description: D.2 archival should be explicitly skipped

assertions.name: records_minimal_progress
assertions.description: Should still record D.1 minimal progress note
